name: Auto-Close PIDs (PySide6)
description: Cross-platform Qt desktop app to schedule graceful termination of selected processes after a delay, with live process introspection via psutil.
longDescription: PySide6 UI lists processes (PID, name, user, status, memory), supports multi-select, and schedules terminations after a delay in seconds, minutes, or hours, including multiple independent schedules. The app refreshes automatically, prefers graceful termination before force-kill, and targets Windows, macOS, and Linux.
features: Modern desktop UI with premium styling cues
Graceful terminate with escalation to force kill
highlights: Useful for freeing resources after long-running jobs
challenges: Process killers are dangerous if mis-clicked or run with elevated privileges.
solutions: Require explicit selections, show confirmations for destructive schedules, and log actions where feasible.
security: Avoid scheduling terminations for system-critical PIDs
Warn when multiple users share a workstation
